ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING #1, REPORT, FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Oct-23-2018 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Judith Baer for Austin Jennings.
Gregory Winslow litigation Counsel for Administrator.

Ms. Baer stated that "Estate Accounting" prepared a small portion of the accounting, asked the Court to let go of the issue of money that was taken by the Executor without authority, stated that this is so complex and requested that the Court not reduce compensation to the Administrators. Ms. Baer also stated that page 8 lines 4 and 5 of the proposed order that reads the property gets distributed to petitioner as trustee of the trust can be taken out of the order. The Court granted the First and Final Account and Report of Administrator, etc. (subject to the order being reviewed and revised).

Judge: John K. Stewart. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: R. Rosado. Not reported.

PROBATE ACCOUNTING STATUS PETITION
Off Calendar May-23-2017 Continued To Jun-20-17 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Judith Baer for Monica Thompson.

Ms. Baer apologized to the Court stating that she neglected to provide proper notice with the required 12201(b) language, spoke of the Petitioner's medical condition and stated that the Petitioner will not be unable to provide an accounting. The Court informed Counsel that it will not be able to appoint a successor personal representative without removing the executor and that the petition does not ask for removal. Ms. Baer stated that she got in touch with Herb Thomas and Larry Siracusa to have a successor trustee appointed in the Trust matter and to have a special needs trust established for Monica. The Second Report of Status of Administration and Request for Extension of Time Administer Estate is continued to June 20, 2017 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 for Counsel to provide proper notice to everyone who is entitled to receive notice.

Judge: Peter J. Busch. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: A. Jaime. Not reported.

Off Calendar Mar-15-2017 Continued
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance was made by any Party, Counsel or Interested Person.

An Order to Appear will be issued to the Executor and the Attorney to appear on April 26, 2017 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 to explain why they failed to appear and why a petition to close the Estate or a petition for approval of report of status of administration has not been filed. Status on close of estate is also continued to that date.

Judge: Peter J. Busch. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: A. Jaime. Not reported.

Petition For Order Directing The Clerk Of The Court To Issue Citations For Examination And Production Of Documents Or Alternatively, For An Oroder Compelling Depositions With Production Of Documents
Off Calendar Aug-11-2015 Continued To Sep-29-15 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Greg Winslow for (administrator) Monica Thompson. Robert Bockelman in Propria Persona.

The Court stated that we are here on a petition for an order to issue a citation, confirmed with Mr. Bockelman that he is present to object, that we will continue the hearing in order for Mr. Bockelman to file his objections and allow time for Mr. Winslow to respond and stated that the parties are to meet and confer with respect to resolving the issue in a way other than the court issuing a citation. The Petition for order directing the clerk of the court to issue citations for examination and production of documents, etc., was continued to September 29, 2015 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. The objections are to be filed no later than September 18, 2015.

Judge: Peter J. Busch. Clerk: Leslie Gomez. Bailiff: Deputy Kabasares. (Not Reported)
